## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between RAMP Holdings and GrowthX Labs to discuss ongoing SEO and content projects.](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Expense category pages facing technical issues; published until 'E', awaiting resolution](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Blog migration targeted for mid-February](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Vendor pages in progress; feedback provided on versus/alternatives articles](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Identified numerous pages needing refreshes; team to collaborate on prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Q1 targets to be determined; focus shifting from accounting to new areas](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)

## Topics

### Technical Issues and Content Migration

  - [Expense category pages: Technical issue flagged, published until 'E'](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Blog migration: Targeted for mid-February](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Vendor pages: In progress, tutorial taken](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### Content Feedback and Data Integration

  - [Versus/alternatives articles: Apply feedback from first page (focus on data-driven sections)](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Streamline content while maintaining important sections](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Awaiting data for graphs on user adoption; will be dynamically updated](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [GrowthX to integrate data into articles once received](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Identified 94+ URLs potentially needing refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Current process: 40-50 URLs updated per month](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Proposed workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [GrowthX to expand content based on ranking posts and other services](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
      - [Deliver updated content in doc format with additions highlighted](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)
      - [Use SEO testing tool to track improvements](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Challenge: Ensuring no overlap with RAMP's existing workflow](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Solution: Share Asana list of "to be tuned" and "in progress" items](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=655.0)

### Q1 Targets and Future Focus

  - [Complete next round of vendor pages](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
  - [Potential shift from accounting to new areas](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Specs for new focus areas to be provided soon](https://fathom.video/share/ZaPoq4feHa597_5m_-ZZphh2cMBn3ppD?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
